description: Allow /intake precheck to run before Cognito account creation after the user accepts the minimum privacy notice. Create a short-lived signed server-readable context/cookie containing only precheck outcome, residency state, selected treatment, privacy notice version, issued-at/expiry, and nonce. Do not persist anonymous precheck records in DynamoDB, localStorage, sessionStorage, logs, Stripe, or URLs. Update Next route and serverless Lambda mirrors for anonymous bootstrap/precheck while preserving the authenticated path.
title: Implement anonymous precheck context token
